title: Opening SOP
content: Staff must check cleanliness and product arrangement before opening.

title: Closing SOP
content: Staff must clean the kiosk area and ensure products are stored properly before closing.

title: Wild Honey
content: Wild honey is a natural honey product sold by Jungle House.

title: Customer Recommendation
content: Staff should recommend honey based on customer taste and health needs.

title: Escalation Rule
content: If no confident answer is found the question should be escalated to the team lead.
